# discord_emoji (Resource)

Manages a custom emoji within a Discord server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `image` (String, Sensitive) The base64-encoded image data (must be PNG, JPG, GIF, or WEBP, max 256KB).
- `name` (String) The name of the emoji (2-32 characters).
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server the emoji belongs to.

### Optional

- `roles` (List of String) Roles that can use this emoji.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the emoji.
